title: Eversource Enhances its Carbon Reduction Goals by Committing to Science-Based Target
Eversource Energy (ES) Q3 Earnings Lag Estimates, Sales Beat
text: Eversource Energy's (ES) third-quarter earnings were lower than expected. ES reiterated its long-term capital expenditure guidance of $18.1 billion to further strengthen its operations.

title: Eversource Energy Reports Third Quarter Results
Eversource (ES) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Eversource Energy's (ES) third-quarter earnings are likely to have benefited from organic growth and the complete integration of acquired assets into its system.
